variant_view: Template only: the market may be over-discounting durable customer-asset growth relative to regulatory and trading-cycle risks. No investment conclusion until evidence fields are verified.

pillars.name: business_truth
warnings: Verify revenue mix, customer assets and payer mechanics.

pillars.name: survival
warnings: Verify liquidity, regulatory capital and jurisdiction risk.

pillars.name: value_capture
warnings: Verify diluted share count, buybacks and ordinary-share access.

pillars.name: price_odds
warnings: Run valuation scenarios using current verified data.

payer_economics.leverage_support_assessment: Do not infer utility-like leverage capacity; verify regulatory capital, client-credit exposure and liquidity.

metric_rules.rationale: Sustained asset contraction challenges the compounding thesis.
Loss of access to a core market can permanently impair the thesis.

add_on_weakness_conditions: All five gates PASS with refreshed evidence
prohibited_actions: Average down solely because price fell
Use unverified regulatory rumors as evidence
